statement: In every magma, Equation 3173 (`x = (((y * y) * z) * w) * z`) implies Equation 443 (`x = x * (y * (y * (z * y)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0930
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) z) w) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op y (op z y))))
